message:
feat(ufunc,linalg): add gufunc shape validation, ufunc expansion, and harden linalg error paths

fnp-ufunc: Add GufuncSignature::validate_shapes() that validates
operand shapes against core dimension contracts, resolves dimension
names to consistent sizes, broadcasts loop dimensions, and computes
output shapes. Expand ufunc input test cases and oracle fixtures.

fnp-linalg: Replace unreachable!() panics with proper error returns
in cholesky_2x2 (invalid uplo) and qr_2x2 (Raw mode), preventing
undefined behavior on invalid inputs.

fnp-io: Minor formatting cleanup.

Regenerate raptorq sidecar artifacts and oracle output fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
